Description: The ATtiny25/45/85 is a family of low-power, high-performance 8-bit AVR microcontrollers based on a RISC architecture, featuring in-system programmable Flash memory for program storage. It integrates a core with 32 general-purpose registers, SRAM, EEPROM, multiple timers with PWM, a USI for serial communication, a 10-bit ADC, an analog comparator, and a watchdog timer. Designed for embedded control applications, it offers various power-saving modes and operates across a wide voltage range, with the number of I/O lines and memory size varying by specific model (2/4/8KB Flash, 128/256/512B EEPROM/SRAM).

KeyParameters.CPU Speed: Up to 20 MHz (model and voltage dependent)
